GetDnsResolverList.marker: The starting position for batch list queries, a system-generated string
GetDnsResolverList.maxKeys: Maximum number of items per page, up to 100
GetDnsResolverList.status: Status of the resolver. Values: CREATING: being created; CREATE_FAILED: creation failed; RUNNING: running; STOPPED: stopped; DELETING: being deleted. If empty, returns all resolvers; otherwise returns resolvers with the specified status.
